title: feat: migrate Claude models to direct Anthropic API
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Claude phones home directly
gist.blurb: We've cut out the cloud middlemen. Claude models now connect directly to Anthropic, bringing prompt caching and faster responses to the hive.
gist.summary: Migrated all Claude models from AWS Bedrock and Google Vertex to the direct Anthropic API to enable prompt caching and streamline provider configuration.
gist.impact: Users will experience improved reliability and faster processing for cached prompts across all Claude models.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee establishing a direct physical connection (a glowing cable) to a server representing Claude/Anthropic, bypassing floating cloud symbols. The monitor robot is excited about the new speed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot connecting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cable directly to a high-tech server terminal labeled 'CLAUDE'. The monitor robot gives a thumbs up nearby. Soft lavender and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, chunky 8-bit sprites, Stardew Valley vibes. Pixel text: 'DIRECT CONNECT'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
